item.title: Defender for Office 365 Anti-Phishing: Stop Impersonation and AiTM Attacks
item.description: Configure Defender for Office 365 anti-phishing policies to block impersonation attacks, spoof intelligence, and AiTM session cookie theft in Microsoft 365.

item.title: Purview Endpoint DLP: Block Data Exfiltration from Windows Devices
item.description: Configure Purview Endpoint DLP on Windows 10/11 to block data exfiltration. Covers device onboarding, SIT conditions, block actions, and Activity Explorer.

item.title: Complete Guide: Conditional Access Policies in Entra ID
item.description: Step-by-step guide to Conditional Access in Microsoft Entra ID. Covers policy anatomy, grant controls, sign-in risk, user risk, and safe rollout for E3 and E5.

item.title: How to Configure DLP Policies in Microsoft 365
item.description: Configure DLP policies in Microsoft Purview step by step. Covers SITs, simulation mode, Teams, Endpoint, and Copilot. Data breaches cost $4.44M in 2025.
